forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the north, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 16.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Cloudy. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending northerly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning south to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, most likely later tonight. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sun protection 12:10pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 40 km/h before tending west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 12:20pm to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. The chance of frost near the eastern border in the early morning. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Mostly sunny morning. The chance of morning fog in the east. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late evening.

Cloudy. Areas of morning frost on and east of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Patches of morning frost on and east of the ranges. Light winds becoming northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of frost west of Nullarbor in the early morning. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before tending west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending northerly in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon, then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost north of Coober Pedy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost north of Coober Pedy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between minus 1 and 6 above zero with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Areas of morning frost north of Coober Pedy. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost north of Marla. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Mostly clear. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening.
Mostly sunny. Areas of morning frost east of Leigh Creek. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost west of Leigh Creek. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Patches of morning frost west of Leigh Creek. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
